message:
refactor: migrate test infrastructure from manual Dolt server to testcontainers

Replace hand-rolled Dolt sql-server process management (port selection,
file locking, cross-process coordination, PID files) with testcontainers-go
Dolt module. This eliminates the doltserver_unix.go build-tagged file and
simplifies all testmain_test.go setup across packages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -138,6 +138,9 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           curl -L https://github.com/dolthub/dolt/releases/latest/download/install.sh | sudo bash
 
+      - name: Pre-pull Dolt Docker image
+        run: docker pull dolthub/dolt-sql-server:1.82.4
+
       - name: Cache beads (bd)
         id: cache-beads-int
         uses: actions/cache@cdf6c1fa76f9f475f3d7449005a359c84ca0f306 # v5

@@ -40,6 +40,9 @@ jobs:
           curl -sL https://github.com/dolthub/dolt/releases/latest/download/dolt-linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar xz
           mv dolt-linux-amd64/bin/dolt ~/go/bin/dolt
 
+      - name: Pre-pull Dolt Docker image
+        run: docker pull dolthub/dolt-sql-server:1.82.4
+
       - name: Add to PATH
         run: echo "$(go env GOPATH)/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
